text.title: terraform Failure Modes
text.summary: Migrated antipatterns for terraform as failure modes. Add detector + repair clauses where missing.

failure-mode.description: Single monolithic Terraform configuration for all environments and components.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: A single state file covering all environments means terraform plan locks all environments simultaneously. A single plan error blocks deployments to all environments. Limits parallelism and increases blast radius.

failure-mode.description: Applying a re-generated plan (not the saved plan file) in CI after human review.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Infrastructure can change between plan review and apply. Re-planning may produce different plan than reviewed, allowing unreviewed changes to reach production.
